description: Transitioning from day to night footwear is no more a question of worry on busy days. Enjoy a vintage look and modern comfort with the Arratoon oxford range of shoes from rockport. Designed for elegance and comfort, it is engineered with DMX technology that generates air flow dynamically while you walk, creating a cushion for your feet, making it an absolute favourite for everyday wear. Upper Full-grain and suede leather upper for added  strength and durability and to retain the natural look of the  hide Wingtip toe design and stylish perforated design for added sophistication Traditional lace-up closure with padded collar for secure and comfortable Fit Padded tongue and collar to help protect from excessive  rubbing and prevent blisters Elongated lace vamp with perforated tongue for extra snug fit and added ventilation Midsole Moulded footbed made of polyurethane (PU) for long term  wear Shock absorbant cushioning to reduce foot fatigue Strobel technology on the heel to provide cushioned  comfort for the feet, but is at the same time firm and  enhances support and flexibility to aid walking Outsole Flex grooves and circular lugs provide durable grip on various surfaces Added support on inner arch of the foot for better support Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole delivers shock absorption reducing foot fatigue Moisture absorbent, odour resistant cushioning keeps feet dry and comfortable AdiPRENE technology employed in outsole for added cushioning to protect the feet from impact Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
